description_long: This is a rustic wooden handcart with a rectangular open cargo area, reinforced by vertical and horizontal slats along the sides. The cart features two large spoked wooden wheels mounted on either side, providing stability and mobility. At the front, two long wooden handles extend outward, designed for manual pulling or pushing. The load platform consists of open wooden slats, allowing for ventilation and drainage, and is bordered by sturdy side rails to prevent items from falling out. The wood appears weathered and aged, giving the cart a vintage, utilitarian look suitable for transporting goods in an urban or rural setting. Metal fastenings and axles are visible, adding structural integrity to the overall design.
description: A weathered wooden handcart with large spoked wheels, open slatted platform, and sturdy side rails, designed for manual transport of goods.
description_view_0: Front view showing the dual wooden handles and the open cargo area with side rails.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large spoked wheel, open slatted platform, and extended handles.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open cargo area, side rails, and the back end of the platform.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the wheel, slatted platform, and the side rails.
